preview.title: Preview
preview.hint: Click an area to select. Drag to move; use corner / edge handles to resize. All values are stored as integers.

import.title: Import
import.description: Load a .zip pack or an already-extracted pack folder. A resolution selector will open during import.

save.title: Save (folder)
save.description: Write the resource pack as a folder. "Save As" picks a destination each time; "Overwrite" replaces the folder you opened or last saved to.
save.currentTargetEmpty: Not set (will be assigned when you open a folder or use "Save As")

export.title: Export (.zip)
export.description: Save a single .zip file. Useful for sharing / distribution.

reset.title: Reset
reset.description: Revert all edits to defaults. Saved layout and settings are also cleared.

about.title: About / Licenses
about.description: Version, third-party licenses (FFmpeg / ffmpeg.wasm), and related links.

importDialog.title: Import — Select resolution
importDialog.warning: Current edits will be overwritten. Select a resolution to continue.
importDialog.suggestedDetected: The pack's background.png is {{width}} × {{height}} (shown as the suggested default). Change it if the pack was made for a different resolution.
importDialog.suggestedMissing: No background.png was found, so the resolution could not be estimated. Please specify one.

layoutEditor.presetHint: Scaled to the current resolution and replaces the whole layout (main / locked / preparing).

background.drawOrderHint: In the list, ↑ = back (drawn first), ↓ = front (drawn last)
background.selectPrompt: Select a layer from the list above to edit it here.

lock.title: Use lock images
lock.description: Turn off to disable the lock overlay.
lock.specNote: SeedQueue will not load any lock-N.png if lock.png is missing. The first image in this list is always written as lock.png. Images are stored at their original size (aspect ratio preserved).

status.disabled: Disabled: a transparent 128×128 will be written as lock.png on export (blocks the SeedQueue default).
status.emptyEnabled: Enabled with no images: falls back to the mod default lock.png (nothing is written).
status.active: Enabled with {{count}} image(s): the first is written as lock.png; the rest as lock-1.png onward.

sound.allOffNote: "Silence all events" is on: per-event settings are not exported (the settings are preserved).
sound.resetUnifiedDescription: Consolidate reset_instance / reset_all / reset_column / reset_row into one row.
sound.specDefault: default: nothing is written to sounds.json (falls back to mod defaults). Events with built-in sounds (lock_instance / reset_instance) still play.
sound.specOff: off: writes {"replace": true, "sounds": []} to silence the event.
sound.specFormat: Audio formats: OGG is passed through. MP3/WAV/FLAC/AAC/M4A/OPUS/WEBM are converted to Ogg Vorbis (q:6) via self-hosted ffmpeg.wasm. Core assets (a few MB) are downloaded on first conversion.
sound.unsupported: {{filename}}: unsupported audio format (supported: ogg / mp3 / wav / flac / aac / m4a / opus / webm)

eventInfo.schedule_join: Reserve a not-yet-ready instance to enter automatically as soon as it becomes ready.
eventInfo.schedule_all: Reserve to enter the first instance that becomes ready.
eventInfo.scheduled_join_warning: A warning related to a scheduled join (e.g. the target instance isn't ready yet).
eventInfo.bypass_wall: Enter a prepared instance directly, skipping the wall screen.

about.title: About SeedQueue Wall Maker
about.appDescription: A GUI for creating and editing resource packs for the <0>SeedQueue</0> Minecraft Speedrunning mod. Same codebase ships a Web build (browser) and a Desktop build (Tauri).
about.appLicenseLine: Copyright (C) 2026 bafv4 and contributors. Licensed under <0>the GNU GPL v3 or later</0>. This program is distributed WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY. See the bundled LICENSE for details.
about.ffmpegIntro: MP3/WAV/AAC/M4A/FLAC/OPUS/WEBM files are converted to Ogg Vorbis using ffmpeg.wasm (FFmpeg compiled to WebAssembly). The core assets are bundled with the app (self-hosted) — no external CDN.
about.ffmpegCore: FFmpeg / @ffmpeg/core — Copyright (c) the FFmpeg developers. The bundled ffmpeg-core.wasm is licensed under GPL v2 or later (ffmpeg.wasm's default core build).
about.ffmpegNote: To satisfy GPL requirements, ffmpeg-core is shipped as a separate, replaceable asset. You can drop your own ffmpeg-core.js / ffmpeg-core.wasm into public/ffmpeg/. See the README for details.
about.languageDescription: Choose the display language. The selection is stored in your browser.

toast.overwriteNoTarget: No save target yet — use "Save As" first
